title: publisher-npm plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the publisher-npm semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables. Registered as "publisher-npm" (rather than the short name "npm") to avoid colliding with the updater-npm plugin, which is already registered as "npm".

SEMREL_PLUGIN_NPM_TOKEN.description: npm registry auth token used to publish the package.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_NPM_ACCESS.description: npm package access level. Only relevant for scoped packages.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_NPM_PROVENANCE.description: When true, publish with npm provenance attestation.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
